title: Benchmarking fish biodiversity of seaports with eDNA and nearby marine reserves
author: Manel, Stéphanie
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Raw eDNA data for teleo in marine ecosystem (28 samples in port) Two types of files
File containing the sample names, the associated tags and the primers sequences

Miseq paired-end sequencing files (12 replicate PCRs per sample, six negative extractions and three PCR controls) Details are in the paper: Manel, S., Mathon, L., Mouillot, D., Bruno, M., Valentini, A., Lecaillon, G., Gudefin, A., Deter, J., Boissery, P., & Dalongeville, A. (2024). Benchmarking fish biodiversity of seaports with eDNA and nearby marine reserves. Conservation Letters, e13001, https://doi.org/10.1111/conl.13001
